claim_boundary: This viability claim matrix is a conservative internal summary for professional review. It is not legal advice, financial advice, tax advice, valuation advice, compliance certification, investment advice, or a commercial guarantee.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Supports internal reproducibility and diligence; not itself proof of market value.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Internal workflow implementation only. No production monitoring, buyer validation, or commercial guarantee.
professional_review_needed: whether any public description overstates operational maturity
whether system descriptions should be limited in buyer materials
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has an internally implemented local command-center workflow for organizing workplans, trackers, gates, provenance, cockpit modes, and landing checks.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Supports a structured review process; external performance and buyer value remain unvalidated.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Review scaffolding only. No truth validation, prediction, alerting, or production monitoring.
professional_review_needed: liability exposure from describing analytical outputs
scope limits in any pilot agreement
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has internally implemented bounded intake, normalization, review-packet, pattern, negative-space, math-overlay, scenario suggestion, and audit scaffolds.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: May help organize review priorities; not validated as predictive or operational.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Forecast candidates are review prompts only. No prediction, alerting, causal inference, or truth resolution.
professional_review_needed: whether the term forecast should be renamed or heavily qualified in public materials
risk of implying prediction or monitoring
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has a bounded forecast-candidate and negative-space review scaffold that produces human-review prompts, not predictions.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Supports disciplined client delivery preparation; must be reviewed by lawyer/CPA before real procurement or paid pilot use.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Workflow scaffold only. No legal advice, compliance certification, truth validation, or binding terms.
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has an internally implemented client intake, data-room, provenance, review-packet, delivery-scaffold, and closeout-audit workflow.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Reduces internal risk, but does not replace legal review.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Risk-control tooling only. No legal certification or compliance approval.
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has internal language-risk and artifact-promotion gates to reduce overstatement and preserve provenance before promotion.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Supports diligence and professional review; not a professional audit.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Internal artifact accounting only. No legal or accounting certification.
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has a local artifact inventory with hashes, paths, classifications, and professional-review boundaries.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Potential value exists as structured workflow assets, but external validation and professional review are required.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: No commercial validation, valuation, revenue guarantee, or investment claim.
matrix_rows.safe_claim: Commercial viability remains unvalidated until buyer conversations, paid pilots, or external evaluations occur.

matrix_rows.business_relevance: Critical before disclosure beyond bounded, text-only, non-protected summaries.
matrix_rows.claim_boundary: Ownership/provenance preparation only. No IP legal opinion.
matrix_rows.safe_claim: SpecShift has internally generated artifacts and provenance records; IP, licensing, ownership, and protected-method strategy require lawyer review.

purpose: Separate conservative viable claims from scaffolded, unvalidated, and professional-review-required areas for lawyer/CPA review.
safe_overall_claim: SpecShift has completed internal workstation, review, provenance, client-delivery, and professional-readiness scaffolds. These are internally implemented workflow assets, not externally validated commercial, legal, tax, compliance, valuation, prediction, or production-monitoring claims.
